layout.title: About - OpenAppCLI
layout.description: Learn about OpenAppCLI - Universal Application Automation Platform + AI Agent Interaction Standard

title: Revolutionizing Application Automation
p-1: OpenAppCLI represents a paradigm shift in application automation. We're breaking down the barriers between different application types and creating a unified platform for universal automation.
p-2: From web scraping to desktop control, from mobile testing to game automation—our platform supports it all. With native AI Agent integration through MCP protocol, we're building the future of intelligent automation.
p-3: Our mission is to make application automation accessible, powerful, and intelligent for everyone.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where any application can be automated by anyone
vision.future: We envision a future where AI Agents seamlessly interact with all applications, making automation as natural as breathing.
